summary: Comprehensive testing of MORGANA Finviz Screener guide completed. Backend API fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend features working correctly including hero section, sidebar navigation, mobile responsiveness, TradingView widget, comparative table, cacería cards, favorites functionality, pro tips, and workflow sections.

design_issues.issue: Two educational sections (pestanas, resultados) have incorrect data-testid attributes
design_issues.details: Sections exist and are accessible via URL fragments, but data-testid selectors don't match expected values

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
GET /api/favorites returns empty list initially
POST /api/favorites creates new favorite successfully
GET /api/favorites returns favorites with data
DELETE /api/favorites/{id} removes favorite successfully
DELETE nonexistent favorite returns 404 correctly
Duplicate favorite creation handled properly
Status endpoints (POST/GET) working correctly
Hero section renders with background image and gold gradient text
Meta items grid displays 24 items correctly
Sidebar navigation shows all 18 nav items
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes sidebar drawer
Mobile responsive layout works correctly
TradingView Advanced Chart widget loads with iframe
All 6 symbol selector buttons present (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, V, GOOGL, TSLA)
Comparative table shows all 8 cacerías with proper columns
All 8 cacería cards render correctly (C1-C8)
Favorite toggle button works with backend API integration
Copy URL button functionality works with feedback
Pro Tips section shows 20 total tips (8 fundamental + 12 advanced)
Common Mistakes section renders 7 error items
Workflow section shows 6-step pipeline
Educational sections (intro, setup) render with tables and callouts
Smooth scroll navigation works for all sections
